title: Meshakian
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Organization |image= |name=Meshakian |type= |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations=*[[Drev'starn]], [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]''[[Vision of the Future]]'' *[[Meshakia system/Legends|Meshakia system]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]''{{Planetnamia|other=the Meshakians|system=[[Meshakia system/Legends|Meshakia system]]|legends=1}} |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Common goods offered as currency on Rim worlds include:
''[…]'' Rare jewelry, including Eriaduan shellwork or anything made by the Meshakians.|Arack Dostryt, ''Bounty Hunters' Guild Handbook''|''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''}} The '''Meshakians''' were a group that originated in the [[Meshakia system/Legends|Meshakia system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Likasha sector/Legends|Likasha sector]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} {{Stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Undefined social groups]]
